name: Vidalia Sweet Onion Chicken Breast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 large Chicken breast, split and boned
2 medium-sized Vidalia sweet onions, peeled and sliced
1 can (10 3/4-oz) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken breast in oil.
2. Drain on paper towel.
3. Heat oil in a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
4. Layer potatoes at the bottom.
5. Add onions over the potatoes.
6. Pour mushroom soup evenly over the onions.
7. Place the chicken breast over the soup, ensuring it is covered by paprika.
8. Cover tightly and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
Yield: 2 servings
Source: The Berkshire Eagle April 22, 1991
